description: Fix factual inaccuracies in docs: wrong Node.js version requirements, outdated publishing package list, missing CLI flags, and missing environment variables.
qualityChecks: cd docs && bun run build && bun run type-check && bun run lint && bun run knip && bun run format:check

userStories.title: Fix Node.js version from v20+ to v22+ in 3 documentation pages
userStories.description: As a user or contributor, I want the docs to state the correct minimum Node.js version (22+) so that I don't install an incompatible version.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/content/docs/first-plugin.mdx prerequisites section says 'v22+' instead of 'v20+'
docs/content/docs/install/index.mdx 'For Contributors' section says '22+' instead of 'v20+'
docs/content/docs/contributing/dev-setup.mdx prerequisites section says '22+' instead of '20+'
No other occurrences of 'v20+' or '20+' remain in any .mdx file under docs/content/docs/ when referring to Node.js version requirements
cd docs && bun run build passes
cd docs && bun run type-check passes
cd docs && bun run lint passes
cd docs && bun run knip passes
cd docs && bun run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Three files to edit:
1. docs/content/docs/first-plugin.mdx line 14: change 'v20+' to 'v22+'
2. docs/content/docs/install/index.mdx line 123: change '(v20+)' to '(v22+)'
3. docs/content/docs/contributing/dev-setup.mdx line 12: change '20+' to '22+'
Source of truth: root package.json has "node": ">= 22.0.0" and so do all platform/*/package.json files. Grep for 'v20' and '20+' across all .mdx files to catch any other occurrences.

userStories.title: Update publishing docs to show 7 published packages instead of 5
userStories.description: As a contributor, I want the publishing guide to list all 7 actually published packages so that the documentation matches the publish script.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/content/docs/contributing/publishing.mdx states 'Seven' (not 'Five') platform packages are published
The packages table includes @opentabs-dev/browser-extension (order 2, depends on shared) and @opentabs-dev/mcp-server (order 3, depends on shared, browser-extension)
The table shows correct dependency order: shared → browser-extension → mcp-server → plugin-sdk → plugin-tools → cli → create-plugin
The paragraph about MCP server and browser extension NOT being published is removed or rewritten to explain they ARE published as npm packages and additionally ship bundled with the CLI
cd docs && bun run build passes
cd docs && bun run type-check passes
cd docs && bun run lint passes
cd docs && bun run knip passes
cd docs && bun run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
File to edit: docs/content/docs/contributing/publishing.mdx

The current table (lines 13-48) lists 5 packages. The scripts/publish.ts PACKAGES array (line 78-86) shows 7 in this order: shared, browser-extension, mcp-server, plugin-sdk, plugin-tools, cli, create-plugin.

Line 11 says 'Five platform packages' — change to 'Seven'.
Lines 49-50 say 'The MCP server and browser extension are **not published**' — this is wrong. Both are published to npm. The CLI depends on browser-extension (bundles it for opentabs start). Rewrite to explain that all 7 are published, and browser-extension/mcp-server additionally ship bundled via the CLI.

Also update the dependencies column:
- browser-extension depends on: shared
- mcp-server depends on: shared, browser-extension
- plugin-sdk depends on: shared
- plugin-tools depends on: plugin-sdk, shared
- cli depends on: mcp-server, browser-extension, plugin-sdk, plugin-tools, shared
- create-plugin depends on: plugin-sdk, shared

Check scripts/publish.ts for accurate dependency info. Use the existing Table component pattern already in the file.

userStories.title: Add missing CLI flags: --show-config for start, --verbose for plugin list
userStories.description: As a user, I want the CLI reference to document all available flags so that I can discover and use them.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/content/docs/reference/cli.mdx 'opentabs start' options table includes --show-config with description 'Print full MCP client configuration even on subsequent runs'
docs/content/docs/reference/cli.mdx 'opentabs plugin list' options table includes -v, --verbose with description 'Show tool names for each plugin'
cd docs && bun run build passes
cd docs && bun run type-check passes
cd docs && bun run lint passes
cd docs && bun run knip passes
cd docs && bun run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
File to edit: docs/content/docs/reference/cli.mdx

1. Add --show-config to the opentabs start options table (around line 56-63). Add a new Table.Row after the --port row:
   Option: `--show-config`, Default: (none), Description: Print full MCP client configuration even on subsequent runs. By default, MCP client config is only shown on first run.
   Source: platform/cli/src/commands/start.ts line 295

2. Add -v, --verbose to the opentabs plugin list options table (around line 400-417). Add a new Table.Row:
   Option: `-v, --verbose`, Description: Show tool names for each plugin.
   Source: platform/cli/src/commands/plugin.ts line 684

Follow the existing Table component pattern in the file.

userStories.title: Add missing environment variables OPENTABS_LOG_LEVEL and OPENTABS_SKIP_NPM_DISCOVERY to configuration reference
userStories.description: As a user or contributor, I want the configuration docs to list all supported environment variables so that I can configure the server correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/content/docs/reference/configuration.mdx environment variables table includes OPENTABS_LOG_LEVEL with default 'info' and description explaining accepted values (debug, info, warn, error, silent)

docs/content/docs/reference/configuration.mdx environment variables table includes OPENTABS_SKIP_NPM_DISCOVERY with default unset and description explaining it disables npm auto-discovery when set to '1'
cd docs && bun run build passes
cd docs && bun run type-check passes
cd docs && bun run lint passes
cd docs && bun run knip passes
cd docs && bun run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
File to edit: docs/content/docs/reference/configuration.mdx

The environment variables section (around lines 248-285) currently has a table with 5 entries. Add 2 new rows:

1. OPENTABS_LOG_LEVEL:
   - Default: info
   - Description: Server log verbosity. Accepted values: debug, info, warn, error, silent.
   - Source: platform/mcp-server/src/logger.ts lines 5-11, 61

2. OPENTABS_SKIP_NPM_DISCOVERY:
   - Default: (unset)
   - Description: Set to '1' to disable npm auto-discovery of globally installed plugins. Useful for testing and CI environments.
   - Source: platform/mcp-server/src/skip-npm-discovery.ts lines 4-12

Follow the existing Table component pattern in the file.
